'''Akin-Dower''' was company specializing in the manufacturing of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] equipment. Flourishing around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], the company was a subdivision of [[Corellia StarDrive]], and headquartered in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. Akin-Dower produced the [[Groundborer]], which was designed to help new colonies quickly establish subterranean tunnels and chambers. When delivering mining equipment to the Frontier, the region later dubbed the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], it hired independent contractors as escorts.<ref name="TotJC" />
